stemHtml: On the RMI the tip of a VOR needle indicates 060. With the CRS set on 055 the indications on the HSI are…

options.a: TO, half scale deflection to the right.
options.b: FROM, half scale deflection to the right.
options.c: FROM, half scale deflection to the left.
options.d: TO, half scale deflection to the left.
